org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.java

类 CompactedObjectInputStream

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.io.InputStream
      • java.io.ObjectInputStream
        • org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.java.CompactedObjectInputStream
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Closeable, DataInput, ObjectInput, ObjectStreamConstants, AutoCloseable

    public class CompactedObjectInputStream
extends ObjectInputStream
    Compacted java object input implementation

    • 嵌套类概要

      • 从类继承的嵌套类/接口 java.io.ObjectInputStream

        ObjectInputStream.GetField

    • 字段概要
